title: IntersectionRouteSegment
description: Represents the contextual lanes that overlap or intersect an intersection route lane

id.description: The lane id of the route segment

distanceAlongTransitRoute.description: The distance along the interseciton transit route that this lane starts at

mergeConnections.description: list of other lanes that merge into the route lanes sink node

splitConnections.description: list of other lanes that split from the route lanes source node

crossConnections.description: list of other lanes are unconnected but intersect with the route lane
